scripts.compile:all: bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/nuntly-darwin-arm64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile dist/nuntly-darwin-x64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/nuntly-linux-x64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile dist/nuntly-linux-arm64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile dist/nuntly-windows-x64.exe
